questions.question_text_full: Which statement is NOT true according to the passage?

options.text: The largest male giraffe usually wins the battles and does most of the breeding.
Giraffes' long necks are the result of repeated stretching over the years.
The giraffe can eat leaves from the upper reaches of a tree where other animals cannot reach.
A giraffe's hind-legs are longer than its fore-legs and help it to bend.

questions.correct_option_text: A giraffe's hind-legs are longer than its fore-legs and help it to bend.
